emails.subject: FW: Telephone interviews
emails.body: FW: Telephone interviews Kevin, Which do you prefer...an AM or PM phone interview? Please let me know, TJae To: Black, Tamara Jae

emails.subject: RE: Telephone interviews
emails.body: RE: Telephone interviews I don't understand this e-mail. To: Presto, Kevin M.

emails.subject: RE: Telephone interviews
emails.body: John Suarez wanted you, Fletch and Dana in do a phone interview with this guy in London. He is available all week but I did not know due to the time difference when you wanted to do it. Would you prefer an AM or PM call? To: Black, Tamara Jae

emails.subject: RE: Telephone interviews
emails.body: PM call with the whole group, including Suarez. Can you find a date that works for everyone. To: Presto, Kevin M.
